continuity_tokens: Mitozz bottle label facing forward cleanly
brand_guardrails: keep the scene stable and elegant
composition: bottle as the primary focal point
space below or beside the bottle for later CTA
reference_strategy: Use the anchors for art direction and the approved bottle photo only for product-truth details.
variation_guardrails: keep the background minimal for clean animation
avoid exact crop duplication from the anchors or source photo

text_overlay.font_reference: Noto Sans JP or closest available sans-serif for Japanese

sora_handoff.shot_goal: Introduce the product as a calm premium reset moment.
sora_handoff.subject_motion: Very light hand movement settling the bottle.
sora_handoff.transition_out: Hold the final bottle position before the end frame.
sora_handoff.prompt: Animate this image into a calm premium product reveal in vertical format. Preserve the exact bottle silhouette, cap finish, label placement, and overall room continuity. Use only subtle natural motion and restrained editorial camera movement. The hand may gently settle the bottle into place. Do not add extra products, extra hands, or dramatic reflections. Keep the frame stable and elegant.

notes: Shot 03 of a coordinated March 25 reel set. Generate final selected output as .jpg.
